entry.title: Issues with Import Supplier Invoice Application (India Localization)
entry.content:
We are facing the following issues while attempting to post a supplier invoice (India localization) using the Import Supplier Invoice application:

  1. The Place of Supply field is missing in the template file.
  2. There is no option to maintain Withholding Tax details in the template file.
  3. We are receiving a warning message during the process.

Please assist us in resolving these issues while posting invoices.

entry.title: Re: Inventory Posting in SAP Business One SDK
entry.content:
Hi Johan_Hakkesteegt,

It's been a while since I used it.

From what I remember, it specifies the exact time when the counting starts.

Since you seem to have the code, could you try running it without setting the CountTime? I believe it should automatically assign a value.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

entry.title: Re: Is SAP Learning Hub available to individuals?
entry.content:
Hi Lorie, 

Hope the following link helps:
https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-learning-q-a/how-can-an-independent-consultant-purchase-a-new-redesigned-sap-learning/qaq-p/13603893

I see https://www.sap.com/training-certification/learning-hub.html provides the way to be priced by "users" per year. 

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud: Unifying Enterprise Data for Next-Generation Insights
entry.content:
@Chad_He  SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC) is designed as a unified platform that integrates the core functionalities of SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud, among other components. While today these products exist as distinct solutions, over time the vision is to offer customers a seamless, integrated experience under the BDC umbrella.

In practice, this means that the capabilities you currently enjoy in SAP Datasphere (such as unified data modeling and semantic enrichment) and SAP Analytics Cloud (advanced visualization, planning, and analytics) will be accessible within a single, cohesive environment. Rather than completely replacing them overnight, SAP’s roadmap suggests these solutions will evolve and converge, streamlining the user experience while retaining their core strengths.

Ultimately, while the individual branding might shift, the rich functionalities of both SAP Datasphere and SAP Analytics Cloud will continue to be available—just delivered through the comprehensive SAP Business Data Cloud platform.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business Data Cloud: Unifying Enterprise Data for Next-Generation Insights
entry.content: @bikerin100I said internal architecture document. If you are an SAP employee, you might have access else it is under process to be published, As of now here is the help document related to SAP BDC https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_DATA_CLOUD?locale=en-US

entry.title: Unlocking the Future with SAP Business Data Cloud
entry.content:
In today’s fast-paced digital landscape, organizations thrive on data. But what if every decision could be powered by a single, harmonized source of truth? SAP Business Data Cloud is making this a reality—a transformative platform that unifies data, drives actionable insights, and propels companies into the AI-driven future.

🌍 From Data Chaos to Clarity

For years, businesses have struggled with fragmented, siloed data—leading to inconsistent insights and costly inefficiencies. IT teams and business leaders often found themselves lost in translation, with data scattered across various platforms.

Enter SAP Business Data Cloud—the ultimate game-changer. No more tangled extracts or redundant copies. Instead, SAP delivers:

✅ Unified Data Management

 

  • Seamless Integration: Connect SAP and non-SAP systems like SAP S/4HANA, SuccessFactors, Ariba, and legacy BW platforms.
  • Harmonized Business Semantics: Retain full business context for clear, actionable insights.

 

✅ Real-Time, Closed-Loop Decision Making

 

  • Insight Apps: Prebuilt analytics & planning tools that transform raw data into business intelligence instantly.
  • Immediate Data-to-Decision Execution: Eliminate lengthy data extraction processes.

 

✅ Advanced AI & Analytics Integration

 

  • SAP Databricks Partnership: Supercharge AI and machine learning capabilities.
  • Joule AI Copilot: A generative AI assistant delivering smart, real-time recommendations.

 

🏗 The Architecture Behind the Innovation

SAP Business Data Cloud isn’t just powerful—it’s built on a scalable, future-proof foundation:

🔹 Foundation Services – Data integration, transformation, and management, fully handled by SAP. 🔹 SAP Datasphere – The heart of the platform, maintaining the unified business data model. 🔹 SAP BW/4HANA & Legacy BW Integration – Seamless modernization for on-premise systems. 🔹 SAP Analytics Cloud – Interactive dashboards, planning, and visualization tools. 🔹 SAP Business Data Cloud Cockpit – A central hub for managing, extending, and sharing data products.

🎯 Key Takeaways for Business Leaders

SAP Business Data Cloud isn’t just another data solution—it’s the foundation for intelligent decision-making. Here’s why it matters:

🚀 Transform Data into a Strategic Asset ✔ Reduce data extraction costs and inefficiencies. ✔ Establish a single, reliable source of truth for all business operations.

🚀 Accelerate AI-Powered Innovation ✔ Automate processes and enable self-service analytics. ✔ Preserve data quality, context, and business relevance.

🚀 Enable Seamless Enterprise Integration ✔ Unify disparate systems—cloud, on-premise, hybrid—into one cohesive platform. ✔ Foster a data-driven culture with real-time insights available at every level.

🏭 Industries Poised to Benefit

The versatility of SAP Business Data Cloud makes it a game-changer across industries:

💰 Finance – Optimize cash flow, working capital, and risk management.

📦Supply Chain– Enhance visibility, forecasting, and agility in logistics.

📊 Procurement– Unlock strategic sourcing and supplier performance insights.

🛒 Sales & Customer Experience – Personalize engagement and optimize sales pipelines.

👥Human Resources – Predict workforce needs and enhance HR planning.

🔮 The Future is Now

The story of SAP Business Data Cloud is a journey from fragmentation to unified intelligence. Organizations ready to embrace AI-powered decision-making can now move beyond outdated data silos and step into a new era of enterprise intelligence.

In a data-driven world, the right foundation isn’t optional—it’s essential. Are you ready to unlock the full potential of your business data?

Let’s shape the future together. Connect with me to explore how SAP Business Data Cloud can revolutionize your data strategy! 💡

#SAP #BusinessDataCloud #AI #DataManagement #DigitalTransformation

entry.title: Here’s how Databricks fits into the SAP Business Data Cloud landscape
entry.content:
1. Keeping Data in Databricks

Scenario Some organizations have non-SAP data (e.g., from third-party apps, IoT sources, data lakes) that they want to retain in Databricks rather than moving everything into SAP’s environment. In the new SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC) architecture, SAP offers an integrated “SAP Databricks” service (an OEM version of Databricks) that seamlessly connects with BDC. This setup allows you to:

 

  • Store certain data sets entirely in Databricks’ object store (Delta Lake).
  • Leverage Databricks’ advanced AI/ML capabilities for those data sets.
  • Federate or share data back to SAP Business Data Cloud without physically copying it multiple times.

 

2. Where the Data Actually Resides

In SAP Business Data Cloud, SAP data is stored in HANA Cloud Data Lake files (an object store) and managed via foundation services. For Databricks, the data typically resides in:

 

  • Databricks’ Object Store: This could be AWS S3, Azure Data Lake Storage, or Google Cloud Storage, depending on your chosen cloud provider.
  • Delta Lake Format: Databricks natively uses Delta Lake for structured storage, enabling versioning, ACID transactions, and efficient reads.

 

“Zero-Copy” Sharing

A key feature in the BDC–Databricks partnership is Delta Sharing or “zero-copy sharing,” which allows you to provide read access to data without physically replicating it. So if a data set is stored in Databricks, you can make it visible to SAP Business Data Cloud analytics or AI use cases, and vice versa, without having to manage multiple data copies.

3. Integration Tools for Non-SAP Sources

When you have non-SAP data that needs to be ingested into Databricks, you can use:

 

  1. Databricks’ Native Ingestion Capabilities
  2. ETL/ELT Tools & Connectors
  3. Cloud Provider Services

 

Putting It All Together

 

  • SAP Business Data Cloud primarily handles SAP application data and makes it available in a curated, semantically rich “data product” format.
  • Databricks (the OEM “SAP Databricks” version) can be your go-to environment for large-scale data engineering, advanced ML/AI, or non-SAP data sets you want to keep outside of HANA Cloud.
  • Integration between the two is seamless. You can keep some data sets exclusively in Databricks while still exposing them to SAP analytics and AI scenarios through zero-copy sharing or standardized pipelines.

 

In short, if your architecture calls for certain data sets to remain in Databricks, you can do so without losing out on SAP’s built-in analytics, AI, and business semantic features. Data is stored in Delta Lake within Databricks, and you can bring in non-SAP data using any Databricks-supported ingestion method or standard ETL/ELT tools. Once in Databricks, that data can still be surfaced in SAP Business Data Cloud for unified insights, all while retaining the power of Databricks for big data processing and machine learning.

entry.title: SAP CDC Identity Sync – Facing Timeouts, Network Errors, and Internal Server Errors During Bulk Impo
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

I’m working with SAP CDC Identity Sync to import around 1 million records into the system. However, I'm encountering issues, including timeouts, network errors, and internal server errors. Below is the error message I frequently receive:

Error Message:
All retries failed with the following results:

  • Retry 1: Network error – gigya.importaccount (Error Code: 500026, Temporary internal server error)
  • Retry 2: Network error – gigya.importaccount (Error Code: 500026, Temporary internal server error)
  • Retry 3: General Server Error – gigya.importaccount (Error Code: 500001)

Additionally, the logs mention issues such as Internal Server Error (Error Code: 500000), DB error, and operation cancellations due to timeouts.

Has anyone faced similar challenges while working with SAP CDC Identity Sync for large-volume imports? If so, how did you resolve or mitigate these errors? Any insights or best practices would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: How to create a macro to quickly extract a report to Excel?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I often need a specific report from SAP UP6 - transaction Y_UD2_51000333 - to be downloaded for me with one click. I mean to encode (?) specific data that is now entered manually into columns so as to avoid entering it every time. How is it possible to create a macro for this?

How do I do it now:

1. I enter the Y_UD2_51000333 transaction in UP6
2. I delete the data that is in the columns automatically in the layout
3. I enter the data for which I want a report - company code value, profit centers group, profit and loss accounts group, balance sheet account group
4. I click 'open'
5. the report appears in Excel

I would like to encode this without having to do steps 2-4.

 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Monitoring Integration Issues with the New “Issues Detected” Event in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content: Your observation is right. We started with 'Erroneous XXXX Message Detected (Grouped)" and "Erroneous XXXX Message Detected (Single)" to start with to enable quick configuration of events based on customer need. And we also allowed events only on Error status group. Now we have a more generic event "Issues Detected in XXXX Messages" which is more flexible and allows the user to raise events on other status groups. We anticipate the usage of the "Erroneous XXXX Message Detected (Grouped)" and "Erroneous XXXX Message Detected (Single)" to reduce over the period of time.

entry.title: Seeking Recommendations: Learning Resources for Aspiring SAP FICO Consultant
entry.content:
Hello SAP FICO Community,

My name is Omar, and I'm based in Morocco. I'm eager to embark on a career as an SAP FICO Consultant and am seeking your valuable guidance.

I've recently completed an SAP Technology Professional Certificate and, with my background in financial consulting, I'm now focused on developing my expertise in SAP FICO. I understand that practical experience is essential, and I'm committed to building a strong foundation.

My goal is to become a proficient SAP FICO Consultant. To achieve this, I'm actively looking for reliable learning resources. I'm hoping you can provide recommendations for:

  • Online Training Courses: Which online platforms or courses offer comprehensive and practical SAP FICO training?
  • Books and Publications: What are the essential books and publications for learning SAP FICO?
  • Practice Systems/Sandboxes: How can I gain hands-on experience with SAP FICO in a practice environment?
  • Community Resources: Are there specific forums, blogs, or websites that are particularly helpful for learning SAP FICO?
  • Certification Preparation: resources that help to prepare for the C_TS4FI certification exam.

I'm particularly interested in resources that emphasize practical application and real-world scenarios. Any recommendations, insights, or personal experiences you can share would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your time and assistance.

Sincerely,

entry.title: Re: Release after output
entry.content:
Data element TDDELETE

Short Text

Release after output

Definition

Switch for deleting a print job. If the switch is set, the spool job is deleted immediately after printing. Otherwise it remains in the spool file after printing and can be printed again if required.

entry.title: What's the use of PMR reference on stock?
entry.content:
Hi all,

In PMR process, the stock will have a PMR reference after staging (single order). I'm wondering the use of the PMR reference, what confused me is the consumption is based on product order like transaction /SCWM/MFG_CONSUMPTION.

Regards, Eric

entry.title: Re: Roadmap Viewer Task - Not Authorized to view this res...
entry.content: Good to hear that it's not only my problem. I already opened an incident but didn't receive an answer until now.

entry.title: Re: Best Practice for Allocating Fixed Expenses in Admini...
entry.content:
Hi,

As your tagging with SAP Profitability and Performance Management already indicate rightfully, when allocation keys are not stored in S/4HANA and method consistency is needed for planning and actuals, PaPM Cloud is an ideal solution, especially when data volume gets bigger which is very often the case for instance in service industries such as transportation, banking, insurance, retail, telecommunication, utilities, etc. when companies have got millions of customers and products/services.    

Best regards, Thomas.

entry.title: Re: How to Configure "standard text key" for task list &...
entry.content: Use transaction CA10. No config necessary

entry.title: Re: How to remove the delete option from Personal Data Co...

entry.title: Re: Filter Bank Details from Business Partner Webservice based on replication model
entry.content: we also do not want to send the bank details to external system. How to achieve that?

entry.title: Re: What's the use of PMR reference on stock?
entry.content:
Hi @EricYu0912 ,

"what confused me is the consumption is based on product order like transaction /SCWM/MFG_CONSUMPTIO"-> My Opinion-In simple word, you blocked the stock for specific Production/Manufacturing process only ( Staged and Consumption for that Order) ... you can only consume that stock when it actually used in Production/Manufacturing process...Using that Tcode you booked that consumption.

Please let us know if further questions...

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: SAP Master Data Integration with Field Service Manage...

unfortunately this does not provide any new infos for me. I already knew this.

I want to know which infos i have to provide to create the service key( Json File ).

Example for S4:

What is the application for FSM ?

Regards

Simon

entry.title: COP1 Transaction - error message VHUPD002 For the material no packing instructions could be found.
entry.content:
In S/4Hana the transaction COWBPACK will be replaced by COP1 or COP2.

In our project for Planned Handling Units out of production are following steps:

POP1: Create packing instructions

POF1: Determination of the packing instruction

COR01: Creation of a production order

CORK: Confirmation of the order 

COP1: Create Planned Handling Units – not working error message please see screenshot below

The error message has the number: VHUPD002

For the material no packing instructions could be found.

But if you see the process which I made material and packing instruction are linked and matched correctly.

How I can solve this problem in the system? What is missing?

Is there any specific customizing setting for this transaction COP1 in S/4HANA?

Thanks for your support.

entry.title: Re: Partial Amount Write-off using BAPI's
entry.content:
Hi Navneet.

The most simple way to split open items, especially when you source is another system, is FM FKK_CRM_ACCOUNT_ITEM_SPLIT. Or you directly use FKK_OPEN_ITEM_SPLIT.

You said you want to have a custom application for mass write-offs, why do you don't use tx. FP04M then? In FI-CA event 5015 you can also add your own coding for the selection, partial write-offs should be supported, as far as I remember.

Regards,

Sascha

entry.title: Re: Alerts not working after upgrade to version 10
entry.content:
In this version, alerts are controlled by the workflow service.

In addition, the user in the database that must have the email defined for sending is the workflow, no longer AlertSvc.

You have to activate the SLD so that the database has the service running. In the instances and companies section, you enable both the mailer and the alerts.

Check that in the Services section of the SLD, you have the Workflow correctly configured (server name or server IP) and it is accessible.


Also, that said service is working in the Windows environment.

entry.title: Re: What's the use of PMR reference on stock?
entry.content: It makes sense, thanks for the reply. Additionally, I noticed that the product has also checked backflush in the order, is it reasonable for a single order?

entry.title: Re: Call an OData Web API Service externally

Now I'm receiving a different response.

I've changed the URL. Unfortunately, I'm getting an error 401 Nicht autorisiert.

So, I push received token to the URL:

I send it with Bearer in the beginning to the header. 

Don't know... Probably something wrong in XSUAA instance settings...

entry.title: SAP analytics cloud upload job starter not appearing in story editor
entry.content:
Hi all, 

i allow my users to upload their budget planning into a budget version, 

i've followed the steps and created an upload job in the model ,

and a corresponding upload starter in the story.

i definedfd the upload starter to use the upload job and the first upload was successful,

for any reason, now when i edit the upload starter in the story, the job is missing.

is it a one time starter?

another upload job that had not been run yet is available in the upload starter editor 

model data managment upload jobs : 

upload starter editor :

entry.title: Issue in SAP Web Dispatcher -
entry.content:
We currently have an SAP web dispatcher in our setup that directs traffic from the enterprise portal to the backend systems.
Although SSL is configured on all these hosts, we are experiencing inconsistencies where requests to the backend are occasionally sent using HTTP instead of HTTPS.
We would like to ensure that all requests are consistently sent over HTTPS.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Issue in SAP Web Dispatcher -
entry.content:
Hello,

See the SAP Online Help for SAP Web Dispatcher configuration  icm/HTTP/redirect_<xx>
You can set it according to your requirements.

kind regards,

entry.title: Unable to edit ABAP Language version of a database table in eclipse ADT.
entry.content:
Hello All,

we have created a new database table and saved in a package for which the "The Default ABAP Language Version" is set to ABAP for Cloud Development, but the software component is updated to HOME (Standard ABAP). Later we have updated the software component the package to "ABAP for Cloud". Now we wanted to change the ABAP language version of the table that was already created to ABAP for Cloud development from Standard ABAP. But the field is not input enabled in eclipse ADT.

How can we update this? If this is not possible to update, do we get any issues if we keep this ABAP Language Version to Standard ABAP in TIER1 Package.

 

Regards,

Ram Peddireddi

entry.title: Worker ID to be the same in both the IAS production system and the S4 system?
entry.content:
Hi,


We have created some users in the S4 production system (Manage Workforce app) with a different Worker ID than in the IAS production system. Is it PERSON_NAME for users to have the same Worker ID in both IAS and S4 systems? If so, is there a way to delete users from the S4 production system (Manage Workforce)?


Regards,


Vidisha


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Worker ID to be the same in both the IAS production s...
entry.content:
To create worker in the IAS tenant, you need to have the same Worker Id. Kindly refer to the KBA 3563886 - Automatic creation of worker ID to provision users from IAS/IPS to cloud system for the same.

For the other query of how to delete the users from the S4 system, it can be done via the ILM process. To configure the ILM process kindly follow the blog How to schedule an ILM job for deleting employee d... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Live profile view Variable Pay-Enhancement
entry.content: Thanks Xavier for the clarification. Switching off Enhanced view makes the bespoke fields appear.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – New improvements in App Support
entry.content:
Some recent SAP Notes related to this functionality that are HIGHLY recommended:

3536614 - Limited Error Log Display in App Support - this increases the number of errors you can display - especially helpful for the Authorizations section

3552103 - App Support: Filter option for log messages - filter out the authorization errors you are NOT interested in.

entry.title: Re: Bonus Assignment Statement-Adding Person ID and Preferred Name field
entry.content: @xavierlegarrec-Thanks for the clarification. Tried to get the following field in the History file...personId using the following mapping but it does not show/output any value...personInfo.person-id-external.Value. Also tried with personInfo.person-id-external.  The type of field is VFLD11. Is there a protocol or trick that is being missed here?

entry.title: Microforum on SAP Business Data Cloud @ SAP Conference for Energy and Utililties
entry.content:
You might have heard about the SAP Business Data Cloud already in last week's announcement.

 

If not, here is more for you to explore from the SAP Business Unleashed: 

 

 

 

 

At the SAP Conference for Energy and Utilities in Rotterdam we will build on the announcement during our microforum session.

What's in for you?

I will deep dive into the different layers of SAP Business Data Cloud providing a comprehensive overview of its different parts and how content is curated and created - now and in the future.

I provide a view of how you can benefit from the available and upcoming content and I will address the frequently asked question: "Is this just another reporting layer?" and demonstrate the unique value SAP Business Data Cloud offers, especially in the context of big data, data lakes, and AI.

And we want to facilitate the discussion on content priorities, future industry-related activities and collect early feedback from you.

Learn through a concrete example how an industry-specific cloud application can leverage patterns introduced in SAP Business Data Cloud.

By the end of this session, you'll have a clear understanding of the newly announced solution with your questions answered or followed up.

Join me for my microforum session on Wednesday, April 9, 2025 at 2:30pm or on Thursday, April 10 at 12pm

 

 

 

If you can't wait until the microforum, can read more here: SAP Business Data Cloud

Looking forward to seeing you in Rotterdam!

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA – New improvements in App Support
entry.content:
@Joel_John Hi John,

The current application component for App Support is CA-FLP-EXT-ASI 

This SAP Note provides an extensibility option to filter messages 

3552103 - App Support: Filter option for log messages - filter out the authorization errors you are NOT interested in. 

If you see something is missing you could raise that through Customer Influence to the SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition opportunity. 

App Support is a launchpad plug-in - so while we don't provide an option to add your own fields, you can of course create your own plug-in. Refer to the SAP Fiori launchpad Developer guide for your release in the SAP Help https://help.sap.com

entry.title: Your Supplier Stories and Successes on SAP Business Network
entry.content:
The Supplier Spotlight program has a milestone to celebrate: for the first time, all your testimonials as suppliers on SAP Business Network have been bundled in an engaging, easy-to-flip-through magazine named Showtime!.
This digital booklet brings your brand and company even more visibility as you share your success with the world. Showtime! will be shared on our social channels, our website and events, as well as with buying organizations considering their presence on SAP Business Network.

If you want to participate to the Supplier Spotlight program and see your company name in a future version of this magazine, simply contact us at supplierspotlightprogram@sap.com and tell us about your success on SAP Business Network. Share a few sentences about how being on the network has benefitted you, and be sure to include:
- Supplier Account’s ANID
- First & Last Name
- Company Name
- Job Title/Role
- Company Country/Region
We’ll reach out to confirm receipt and to ask for any additional information we may need.

On SAP Business Network, sharing success is as easy as sharing transactions!

entry.title: Re: DTW- Outgoing Payment Upload - Journal Entry
entry.content:
Hi @Thaonguyenphuong ,

I'm happy to help.

*** Please, if this answer resolves your question, kindly consider marking it as accepted. This helps our community by highlighting useful solutions. Thank you! ***

entry.title: Re: What's the use of PMR reference on stock?
entry.content: "Additionally, I noticed that the product has also checked backflush in the order, is it reasonable for a single order? "- Of course you would like to automatic consume( Without use that above Tocde -Which you blocked for manufacturing/production process) When you do Goods Receipt as per the Production/Manufacturing/process Order Data.

entry.title: Text-to-speech in simulations: change voice in SEN
entry.content:
Hi all! 

We are working on a project where we use text-to-speech in our simulations. 

We are from the flemish part of Belgium and we would love to have a voice with that accent. We only managed to use/add a voice with a Dutch accent (Frank - Dutch - male voice) to our recordings. 

Does anyone if it is possible to add other voices/accents and which steps to take? 

Thanks in regard 

Laura

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest Winners Revealed
entry.content: Congrats to all the winners! Exciting times are ahead 😄

entry.title: Re: É possível vincular os pedidos de compras à notas fis...
entry.content:
Ola, @satogc 

Nao sei se a versao 9.3 comporta, mas voce poderia realizar o vinculo manual entre os documentos utilizando a aba Contabilidade, referenciando tipo e numero da transacao. O vinculo automatico, que pode ser visualizado no mapa de relacoes nao pode ser feito apos o documento ter sido criado.

Espero que ajude.

Atenciosamente,
Felipe

entry.title: Comprehensive Analysis of Slow/Non-Moving Materials: Comparison Between Fiori App and MC46 Tcode
entry.content:
Slow or Non-moving materials -- items that sit idle in warehouses, tying up capital and consuming valuable storage space. These materials can often go unnoticed, leading to increased carrying costs, obsolescence, and missed opportunities for optimization.

In this blog, we’ll explore how the Slow or Non-Moving Materials App can transform your inventory management processes, reduce waste, and drive profitability. Whether you’re looking to optimize stock levels or enhance warehouse efficiency. Let’s dive in and discover how you can turn slow-moving inventory into a strategic advantage!

Step 1: Open the app Slow or Non-Moving Materials

Step 2: Choose selection options as per Requirement

By Default some filters will be auto applied

Days with Low Consumption as 90 Days: Number of days in the analysis period and determined from the Days with Low Consumption parameter + 1. 1 stand for the reference date, which is included in the period.

Inventory Consumption Group as 0: The Inventory Consumption Group filter only considers those material documents as a consumption-relevant goods movement where the related movement types are part of your specific inventory consumption group. 

Slow-Moving Indicator as greater than 0 and less than 5: Monitor materials with low consumption based on the consumption to stock ratio with the Slow-Moving Indicator. The Slow-Moving Indicator makes it possible to compare different materials with regards to (slow-moving) consumption. Therefore, you can identify and compare critical materials based on your individual criteria. The Slow-Moving Indicator over Time graphic visualizes the evolution of the monthly slow-moving indicator for the past 12 months.

Once required filters applied, click Go. 

Step 3: Slow/Non Moving Material Details

Here in this case, there is no consumption recorded for the past 12 months for material "tool holder".

There were no consumption recorded for the material tool holder after 07.09.2022

SAP GUI Screen (MC46)

Step 1: Navigate to Transaction MC46

By Default some filters will be auto applied

Period: Last consumption: The consumption values will be examined for the number of days you have entered, starting from today's date. For materials with no consumption in this period, the input value displayed in the results list will be the number of days since the last consumption.

Uncheck Materials with Zero stock and check Daily usage check box, then execute the report.

Daily Usage:

If Selected: If you select this checkbox, the usage quantities and values are calculated directly from material document. This enables you to display usage in terms of daily values and quantities, because the posting date is updated in the material document

If Not Selected: It is important to display daily values and quantities if you want to find out the date of the last consumption for a material that is a potential slow-moving item. If statistics are kept for a material on a monthly basis, and the 'Daily usage' option is not selected, then the first day of the month in question is set as the date of the last consumption.

Number of selected materials exactly matched with the total materials in Analytical app

Lets Take an Example Test Case 1:

Material: Tool Holder

Material Movements

Material Creation Date

Since there were no consumption recorded for this material in the given period system will consider material creation date as last consumption date.

From Analytical app point of view

First Receipt recorded in the system with 5 PC (Increase in Qty) on 07.09.2022, system will calculate the Days w/o consumption from 07.09.2022 to current date.

Days w/o consumption

Days w/o posting

Lets Take an Example Test Case 2:

Material: Cutting

Days w/o consumption (from 05.06.2023 to current date i.e 15.10.2024)

From Analytical app point of view

Last consumption happened on 05.06.2023 and last posting happened on 15.10.2024

(Here in this case data matched in both SAP GUI transaction MC46 & analytical app)

entry.title: Re: Acquiring Core ABAP Skills
entry.content:
My problem has been solved and I'll share my solution below. If your problem's screenshot is as follows, the reason for this problem is that there's something wrong with the configuration of the default web browser:

Solution: 

open your eclipse-->Window-->Preferences-->Web Browser-->select Chrome-->Apply

entry.title: Re: Input control unexpected behavior SAC
entry.content: @William_Yu, that was my fisrt step 😞 that's what I've tried: Steps Already Taken: Input Control Properties: I have verified that the "Enable Cascading" option is turned off for both input controls. Property Filter Settings: The "Linked Analysis" option is set appropriately to avoid unintended filtering. Model Settings: The dimensions for currency and payment method in the planning model are not linked or dependent on each other. Version: I am using the latest version of SAP Analytics Cloud available to me.

entry.title: Re: The Power of Joule for Developers, ABAP AI Capabilities

entry.title: smarttable sorting is not working
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have smart table where on load some data is getting populated , now i want to sort the data of the smart table without calling the backend. 

Is there any setting or property where smart table automatically does the sorting and filtering ? 

KR,

entry.title: Re: The Power of Joule for Developers, ABAP AI Capabilities
entry.content:
@cimerman 

Hello!

I am using Claude from Anthropic, which can be called from both VSCode and Eclipse. Also, you can call to it directly via Anthropic API or via Github co-pilot extension. I have tried it less on HANA , but it performs well with ABAP artifacts, incl. ABAP CDS.

 

Thanks -Vlad

entry.content: Just to be sure: You can change the language version by clicking the Edit button on the right side next to the field

entry.title: FMS SUM HEADER FIELDS
entry.content:
Hello everybody.

I want to define a formatted search to add two fields in the order header, so that the total in the third field appears after exiting the second typed field.

I have defined 3 fields of type units and totals and structure amount.

SELECT $[ORDR.U_RTC_Principal] + $[ORDR.U_RTC_Intereses]

I want to get the total from the sum of the first 2, but if I use the + symbol (Sum), it concatenates them and if for example I use * (multiplication) it gives me an error "1).

SELECT $[ORDR.U_RTC_Principal] * $[ORDR.U_RTC_Intereses]

[Microsoft][ODBC Driver 17 for SQL Server][SQL Server]Operand data type nvarchar is invalid for multiply operator.
2). [Microsoft][ODBC Driver 17 for SQL Server][SQL Server]Statement 'Alertasrecibidas' (OAIB) (s) could not be prepared.

Hi @wynnh ,

Regards,

Nagesh

entry.title: SAP Document and Reporting Compliance for Singapore GST InvoiceNow
entry.content:
GST InvoiceNow - submission of invoice data to Singapore Tax Authority (IRAS)

Image from IRAS GST InvoiceNow page

On April 15, 2024, The Inland Revenue Authority of Singapore (IRAS) published media release "Implementation of InvoiceNow for GST-Registered Businesses and free InvoiceNow Services for Newly In..." in the Newsroom. GST-registered businesses will be required to use InvoiceNow solutions to transmit the invoice data directly to IRAS for tax administration. By transmitting invoice data directly to IRAS via the InvoiceNow solutions, GST- registered businesses can streamline their compliance processes, reduce data preparation efforts for their submissions to IRAS and enjoy faster GST refunds.

GST InvoiceNow requirement will be implemented in phases, starting with soft launch from May 2025, allowing any existing GST-registered businesses that wish to be early adopters to transmit invoice data to IRAS using InvoiceNow solutions via InvoiceNow network.

  • From 1 May 2025, for GST-registered businesses that wish to be early adopters.
  • From 1 November 2025, for newly incorporated companies[1] that voluntarily apply for GST registration.
  • From 1 April 2026, for all businesses that voluntarily apply for GST registration.

IRAS will continue to consult industry partners on the initiative and carefully review the feedback received before announcing further details for the remaining GST-registered businesses. 

InvoiceNow solutions are finance and accounting software that allow the transmission of invoices between businesses via the InvoiceNow network. InvoiceNow solutions will be connected to IRAS through Access Points (AP). This connection will enable the transmission of invoice data to IRAS via Application Programming Interface (API) technology. 

Invoices that are not issued using InvoiceNow (e.g. for sales made via point-of-sale systems) should also be recorded in InvoiceNow solutions and sent to IRAS.

The scope of invoice data covers the transactions with GST tax categories of (1) Standard-rate supplies, (2) Zero-rated supplies and (3) Standard-rated purchases on which input tax claims are made or will be made. For (1) & (3) excludes reverse charge supplies and reverse charge purchases.

For more information on the implementation of InvoiceNow for GST-registered businesses, please refer to the IRAS GST InvoiceNow Requirement webpage here.

SAP is an InvoiceNow solution for both Access Point Provider and InvoiceNow-Ready Solution Provider and is currently developing SAP Document and Reporting solution to support GST InvoiceNow requirement, please check the plan & update at Regulatory Change Manager 

Once the solution is ready, the how-to-implement will be published here.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This blog is intended to provide Customers and Partners the guide or where to start of how to implement SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, for Singapore GST InvoiceNow requirement.

Please share your feedback and thoughts in a comment. If you have questions about SAP Document and Reporting Compliance, you can post your question here.

entry.title: Re: Local renaming of an IBP attribute within a MS Excel...
entry.content:
Hi @Andrei_Lupu,

I was just curious because of the availability of this particular "attribute option". But as you said, it seems to be a placebo option w/o any functionality.
Kind of strange. Anyhow, thanks for your reply.

BR, Peter

entry.title: SAPFM06P - BADI_MM_PO_OC_EMAIL for S4CORE 107 and SAPSCRIPT
entry.content:
Dear all,

we are using standard SAPFM06P as program for email output of SAPSCRIPT forms out of purchase orders. By standard only partner function "VN" can be used as recipient, but we want to use a different partner function (which analogous is possible on SD side).
I found SAP note 217371 with BADI_MM_PO_OC_EMAIL and method CHANGE_RECIPIENTS which would basically facilitate our needs. Unfortunately this badi is only available for S4CORE up to 101 (we are using 107) and only for ADOBE (we are using SAPSCRIPT). I wasn`t able to find any other notes suggesting other solutions.

Do you know of any alternative badi/ solution available for our version and SAPSCRIPT

Thanks a lot and BR
Lukas

entry.title: Re: FioriElements - Grouping of table rows
entry.content: here is an example where the Facet is making sure the table is rendered with the PresentationVariant activated: https://github.com/SAP-samples/btp-resource-consumption-monitor/blob/main/cf/app/btprcreport/annotations_CMetrics.cds#L259-L264

entry.title: Re: Errors on revision date in curriculum connector
entry.content: Solution found. I had to put the UTC time zone in the revision date of the item instead of the time zone I can see in the system

entry.title: Re: SAP CDP- Delete Activities from Customer Schema
entry.content:
Hi @Htet,

"Is there a way to delete activities from the Customer Schema?" - yes.
I have an assumption that:
1) We cannot delete Orders activity due to it is coming from OOTB (created in CDP Business Unit automatically/initially).
But
2) You can delete activities that you created (a screenshot will be attached below).

Why you are not able to delete it in your case?
Assumption:
You cannot delete activity when data persists. Firstly you need to delete all interactions related to the activity using the API you mentioned.
When you delete all associated activities, you will be able to delete the activity itself from Customer Schema.

Let me know if you managed that.
Regards,
Oleh.

Can you please retest and let me know if it's solved at your end, too?

Best regards
Susanne

entry.title: How to Enable and Benefits of Latest People Profile in SAP SuccessFactors 2H 2024
entry.content:
Introduction

In the 2H 2024 release of SAP SuccessFactors, the Latest People Profile feature has been introduced to improve how employee data is presented and accessed within the system. This feature unifies all employee information into a comprehensive, modernized profile that is both easy to use and visually appealing. In this blog post, we will guide you step-by-step through the process of enabling and using the Latest People Profile.

Key Benefits of the Latest People Profile

Before we dive into the setup process, let’s first highlight the key benefits of the Latest People Profile:

  • Unified View: Access all key employee data in a single, intuitive profile.
  • Modern User Interface: The profile comes with a fresh, user-friendly layout.
  • Better Accessibility: Employees, HR, and managers can access information with minimal clicks.
  • Improved Decision Making: With all data in one place, decisions are easier to make with real-time insights.

 

How to Enable the Latest People Profile

Step 1: Log in to SAP SuccessFactors

  1. Begin by logging into your SAP SuccessFactors account with administrator credentials.

Step 2: Navigate to Admin Center

  1. Once logged in, go to the Admin Center. This is your central hub for all configuration tasks.
  2. In the Admin Center, find Company Settings.

Step 3: Open Company System and Logo Settings

  1. Under Company Settings, select Company System and Logo Settings.

 

Step 4: Enable Latest People Profile

  1. In the Company System and Logo Settings, locate the option Enable Full Profile for Latest People Profile.
  2. Check the box to enable the feature.
  3. Click Save to apply the changes.

How to Use the Latest People Profile

For HR Professionals

  1. Access Employee Profiles: HR professionals can now access a unified profile for each employee. This profile provides quick access to key employee data, from personal details to performance records.

  2. View Key Data: The profile consolidates essential information like job history, competencies, and compensation. You can even see learning progress, performance reviews, and more—all on one page.

For Managers

  1. Access Real-Time Data: Managers can use the Latest People Profile to view up-to-date information about their team, from performance reviews to development plans.

  2. Track Employee Progress: With an integrated profile, managers can track team members’ learning progress, performance reviews, and development goals.

For Employees

  1. Self-Service Capabilities: Employees can view and manage their personal information, including contact details, performance feedback, and career development records.

  2. Transparency in Career Progression: Employees can access their performance reviews, career goals, and other relevant information, making it easier for them to track their growth.

Step 5: Customize the Latest People Profile (Optional)

Once you’ve enabled the Latest People Profile, you can customize it according to your organization's needs:

  1. Modify Profile Layout: Adjust the layout of the profile sections to suit your needs (e.g., move sections like Performance Reviews to the top).

  2. Add Custom Fields: Include any custom fields that are specific to your business.

Conclusion

Enabling the Latest People Profile in SAP SuccessFactors 2H 2024 provides your organization with a modern, streamlined, easy-to-navigate profile for employees. With a unified view, improved accessibility, and modernized user interface, it offers HR professionals, managers, and employees a more efficient way to access crucial information.

By following the simple steps outlined above, you can enable and start using this powerful feature today!

Additional Resources:

  • Link to SAP SuccessFactors Help page for more detailed guides.

entry.title: Join our Espresso Session on SAP's Utilities Strategy and the Upcoming Conference
entry.content:
Are you ready to plug into the future of utilities? Join us for an electrifying virtual event as we unveil SAP's strategic roadmap for the utilities industry, designed to spark innovation and drive the energy transition.

 

 

 

 

 

🌟 Why Attend?

  • Discover SAP's Strategy: Get a glimpse into SAP's Utilities Industry strategy, packed with our latest innovations and strategic initiatives.
  • Cloud Transformation**: Learn how SAP's cloud transformation journey can empower your business to leverage cloud solutions, AI, and collaborative ecosystems.
  • Expert Insights**: Gain firsthand knowledge from our esteemed speakers, Markus Bechmann, Vice President at SAP Industry Business Unit Utilities, and Melanie Fiolka, Marketing and Communication Lead for Energy & Utilities.
  • Conference Sneak Peek: Hear about the key topics, expert sessions, major highlights, and networking opportunities at the upcoming SAP for Energy and Utilities Conference.

💡 What You'll Learn

  • How SAP is shaping the future of utilities with intelligent technologies.
  • The importance of cloud solutions and AI in driving the energy transition.
  • Key topics and highlights of the upcoming SAP for Energy and Utilities Conference.

🎤 Our Speakers:

  • Markus Bechmann @markus_bechmann 
    VP at SAP Industry Business Unit Utilities, SAP
  • Melanie Fiolka @Mel 
    Marketing and Communication Lead for Energy & Utilities, SAP

📅 Save the date and register 

Date: Thursday, 06 March 2025
Time: 16:00 Central European Time
Duration: 30 minutes

entry.title: Re: Error importing Business Content: Integrated Financia...
entry.content: The version is still 1.34.0 - is this correct? I deleted the folders and started the import again but still getting errors: Couldn't import object 'SAP_FI_IFP_IM_Profitability [C464JF9W96BB9FKSL4UKOI3L6O]' : Parent resource does not exist

entry.title: Customer Engagement Initiative 2025 on Business Event Logging
entry.content:
As part of the new CEI cycle for 2025 we launched a CEI project for Business Event Logging. Registration is open until March 28, 2025.

Business Event Logging allows you to create event logs in SAP S/4HANA systems and on SAP BTP ABAP Environment, based on Business Events and on Change Documents. The logs can be used to evaluate changes to your business documents, and to analyze your business processes with the help of SAP Signavio Process Intelligence.

Register here until March 28, 2025: Insights into Business Processes with Business Event Logging 

We plan to roll-out information about the usage of Business Event Logging, and collect your feedback and ideas.

Find more information about Business Event Logging here:

  • One Tool to Track Them All 
  • Using Customer-Defined Events in Business Event Logging
  • Integrating Business Event Logging with SAP Signavio
  • Transform your Business Processes with SAP Signavio and SAP Build 

Looking forward to seeing you there!

entry.title: Re: SAP Master Data Integration with Field Service Manage...
entry.content:
Hi @Simon You can use below structure, you can add buisness object according to your need

 

"application": "s4",
"businessSystemId": "",  =S/4HANA Public Cloud Own Instance Name
"writePermissions": [
{
"entityType": "sap.odm.businesspartner.BusinessPartnerRelationship"
},
{
"entityType": "sap.odm.businesspartner.BusinessPartner"
},
{
"entityType": "sap.odm.businesspartner.ContactPersonRelationship"
},
{
"entityType": "sap.odm.finance.costobject.ProjectControllingObject"
},
{
"entityType": "sap.odm.finance.costobject.CostCenter"
},
{
"entityType": "sap.odm.orgunit.CompanyCode"
},
{
"entityType": "sap.odm.finance.bank.Bank"
}
]

Please accept the answer if it answer your question

entry.title: Re: Date calculation in TM Freight Order/Booking
entry.content:
Hi @SFC ,

I tried to answer but it looks like not straight forward becasue time depends on different parameters/Masterdata. Please see my opinion and let us know if any questions.

My opinion Only:

Please see the link for Date/Time Windows

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/e3dc5400c1cc41d1bc0ae0e7fd9aa5a2/c46e615477e2053de10000000a441470.html?locale=en-US&q=Date+

"1. Load and unload dates in FO/FB - can these dates also be populated via the PUDR settings?" 

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2653698

"2. Cargo Cut-off date under Pick-Up Location section in FO/FB  and 3. Availability date" -> Got from Schedule 

 

"4. Lastly, fields that we used to get in the shipment document under LE such as check in date and shipment start and end dates, what are the correct date fields that represent them? I am thinking it would be the departure and arrival dates at the stage level? " Please check the below link for difference.

https://www.sap.com/germany/documents/2021/08/7231ed24-f47d-0010-bca6-c68f7e60039b.html

Kind regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: Configuration Transport Center: New way to view, download and transport configurations
entry.content:
Hello @hariprasadgud ,

Hope you are doing well.

I have a situation I'd like to check with you:

  • I have a bundle holding a specific role in a source instance
  • this bundle was created last week
  • today I made a change to one of the roles that are also in that bundle
  • 10 minutes after that change, I promoted that bundle
  • the updated permissions did not travel to the target instance

I was expecting that a bundle does not hold fixed configuration so also for those changed permissions to move along. Is that expectation correct and was the time between promotion and changing the role maybe too short? Or is my expectation incorrect and does a bundle hold fixed configuration as it is while adding it to the bundle and not change anymore?

Hope you can confirm one or the other.

Thanks,
Roos🌹

entry.title: Re: How to Debug a FIORI App and the Debug Triggers in SAP Backend?
entry.content:
Actually this seems the only way to debug. Would be glad to see if there is an easier way to do the debugging in that area. Thank You for Your helpfull documentation.

Regards

Birgit

entry.title: Change document for Custom Field changes not available
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,


In Custom Fields apps, we have made changes in business context & added custom fields. This app only shows Creation details & Last Change details in administration but change log is not available.


Please let us know how we can access the change logs for the changes made in custom fields.


Let me know in case any additional information required.


Regards,


Yash Sali


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Error importing Business Content: Integrated Financia...
entry.content: It is now working as expected.

entry.title: Re: Change document for Custom Field changes not available
entry.content:
Hi

You can use Extensibility Inventory app to check for change history of Custom Field 

  1. Go to Extensibility Inventory App
  2. Search by Custom Field
  3. Click on Change History

For more info, refer

Extensibility Inventory | SAP Help Portal

Best Regards,

Pooja

entry.title: Re: Finding Attachment Document Locations in Solman ChaRM
entry.content:
You can follow this steps to download ChaRM attachments:

1. Search documents in table CRMD_ORDERADM_H by Object_id. Save GUIDs

2. With this GUIDs...

"Check if document has attachments
SELECT * FROM skwg_brel INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_anexos) WHERE instid_a EQ @IT_messages-guid.
  LOOP AT lt_anexos INTO DATA(ls_anexos).
    CLEAR: lt_loio, lt_phio, lt_props, lt_info.

    "Get logical links
    ls_bo-instid  = ls_anexos-instid_a.
    ls_bo-typeid  = ls_anexos-typeid_a.
    ls_bo-catid   = ls_anexos-catid_a.

    CALL FUNCTION 'SKWG_OLS_BO_LINKS_GET'
      EXPORTING
        business_object = ls_bo
      TABLES
        ios             = lt_loio.

    IF lt_loio IS NOT INITIAL.
      "Get physical links
      CALL FUNCTION 'SKWF_LOIOS_ALL_PHIOS_GET'
        TABLES
          loios             = lt_loio
          phios             = lt_phio
          properties_result = lt_props.

      "By each file...
      LOOP AT lt_phio INTO DATA(ls_phio).
        "...get its properties (name & extension)
        READ TABLE lt_props INTO DATA(ls_props) WITH KEY objid = ls_phio-objid
                                                           name  = 'DESCRIPTION'.

        "Download file (PHIO)
        MOVE-CORRESPONDING ls_phio TO ls_phio_obj.

        CALL FUNCTION 'SDOK_PHIO_LOAD_CONTENT'
          EXPORTING
            object_id           = ls_phio_obj
          TABLES
            file_access_info    = lt_info
            file_content_binary = lt_bin
          EXCEPTIONS
            not_existing        = 1
            not_authorized      = 2
            no_content          = 3
            bad_storage_type    = 4
            OTHERS              = 5.

        IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
          READ TABLE lt_info INTO DATA(ls_info) INDEX 1.
          IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
            CONCATENATE p_file it_messages-object_id '_' ls_info-file_name INTO lv_file_path.
          ELSEIF ls_props-value IS NOT INITIAL.
            CONCATENATE p_file it_messages-object_id '_' ls_props-value INTO lv_file_path.
          ELSE.
            CONCATENATE p_file it_messages-object_id '_anexo' INTO lv_file_path.
          ENDIF.

          "Open dataset for write
          OPEN DATASET lv_file_path FOR OUTPUT IN BINARY MODE.
          IF sy-subrc EQ 0.
            LOOP AT lt_bin INTO DATA(ls_bin).
              " Write line data
              TRANSFER ls_bin-line TO lv_file_path.
            ENDLOOP.
            " Close dataset
            CLOSE DATASET lv_file_path.
            WRITE: 'Attachment downloaded:', lv_file_path.
          ELSE.
            WRITE: 'Error'.
          ENDIF.
        ENDIF.
      ENDLOOP.
    ENDIF.
  ENDLOOP.

BR

Fran

entry.title: Re: [BTP Workzone] Metadata not found 404
entry.content: Yes I am facing the same issue.

entry.title: BW Bridge - End DTP jobs, problem delta init
entry.content:
Hello,

After a problem in BW Bridge, I had to reload PCA data from a corporate memory ADSO into an EDW layer ADSO.

The CM ADSO has a lot of requests (6000+) and I wanted to Perform a delta initialization without data and then reload the historical data by a full load.

I did the init without data and then I did a delta from ERP to the CM ADSO and then started the delta to the EDW ADSO. To my surprise, the last delta began to load all the requests from the CM ADSO (Get data request by request was activated in the DTP) into the EDW ADSO.

The problem is that this will take days to finish and because it is in the cloud, I can't find a way to kill it. 

I tried note 3518918 - How to manually stop a BW DTP run, but the web interface is so slow that the request is processed before I can even choose the option.

Is there a way to end this DTP with Get data request by request execution? 

Also, does the init without data not work in BW Bridge? The request with 0 records is there, as in a "classic" BW system, but it didn't seem to prevent everything from loading.

Kind regards and thanks for any input,

Jorg

entry.title: Re: FMS SUM HEADER FIELDS
entry.content:
Hi @gonzalogomez ,

The error "Operand data type nvarchar is invalid for multiply operator" occurs because SQL Server does not allow mathematical operations, such as multiplication, on string data types like nvarchar. To resolve this issue, you need to convert the nvarchar column to a numeric data type before performing the multiplication.

Example: SELECT CAST($[ORDR.U_RTC_Principal] AS FLOAT) + $[ORDR.U_RTC_Intereses]

I hope it helps.

*** Please, if this answer resolves your question, kindly consider marking it as accepted. This helps our community by highlighting useful solutions. Thank you! ***

BR,
Felipe

entry.title: The Art and Science of CAP (part 10) with Daniel Hutzel
entry.content:
Join Daniel Hutzel, hosted by DJ Adams, live on their exploration of The Art and Science of CAP, sharing insights and ideas from the origins, philosophy and magic of the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model. #SAPCAP #TASC

See the series blog post The Art and Science of CAP for details, notes, links, other episodes and more.

entry.title: Using Umlaute and special Characters in an htm email template
entry.content:
After creating an html email template into SAP Business ByDesign you realize that Umlaute i.e.

Ö, Ä Ü and

 ä, ö, ü 

are not shown correctly.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Using Umlaute and special Characters in an htm email...
entry.content:
this usually happens while template creation.

 

I good way is to create an html template in MS Word and us save as with the correct file extension Web Page (htm, html).

entry.title: Re: SAPFM06P - BADI_MM_PO_OC_EMAIL for S4CORE 107 and SAP...
entry.content:
The KBA 2667292 - How to manipulate external mail in MM output - SAP ERP & SAP S/4 HANA describes other solutions such as some enhancement spots, have you read it yet?

(Also some related OSS notes are currently being improved and a new version is in preparation but not released yet. Not sure for old Sapscript?)

entry.title: Re: Configuration Transport Center: New way to view, download and transport configurations
entry.content:
Hi @RoosReijers ,

The bundle which is just created and not yet transported will not have fixed configurations. The actual version of configuration at the time of transport is what will be exported to target not the version on the system when adding it to the bundle.

But when you are performing Promote, It is something exported from original source and validated on target tenant at least once by importing. In this case we hold the configurations in the original state not the modified state of the configurations on target tenant.

Thanks,

Hari

entry.title: Re: Fiori Apps for searching Productions orders with SPLI...
entry.content: Yes, this app (better known as COOIS) has System Status SPLT / CSPL to filter only those orders from whole Release orders list
